title: 9 Herbal Teas for Older Adults to Fight Dental Plaque
description: Salvia officinalis teas have been studied for their potential to help reduce dental plaque. The herb contains compounds like thymol and carvacrol, which have antimicrobial properties that can inhibit the growth of bacteria responsible for plaque formation. These bacteria, such as Streptococcus mutans, can cause tooth decay and gum disease. Drinking Salvia officinalis tea may help reduce the number of these bacteria in the mouth, thereby reducing plaque buildup. To try using Salvia offi...
